server.name: mcp/sonarqube
server.title: SonarQube
server.description: Code quality and security analysis for self-hosted SonarQube Server instances.

environmentVariables.name: SONARQUBE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: SonarQube USER token (type: USER). Project tokens and Global Administrator tokens are not supported by SonarQube Server's MCP integration and will not work.

environmentVariables.name: SONARQUBE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Internal SonarQube server URL. Must point to a self-hosted instance (e.g. https://sonarqube.internal.example.com). SonarCloud is not permitted.
